top_signals.title: Iran Sneaks Out Tankers Via Hormuz as Trump Amps Up Threats
top_signals.summary: Iran has reverted to its well-used tactic of going dark to move oil tankers through the Strait of Hormuz in recent days, even before the US said it would reimpose a blockade of the country’s ports.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Japan to boost measures against heatstroke and cold at evacuation centers
top_signals.summary: The revised plan comes after residents in many parts of Japan had to spend long hours at evacuation centers following a powerful earthquake in July last year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Japan closely watching U.S. campaign against ICC
top_signals.summary: Japan has "consistently supported the ICC" from the standpoint of upholding the rule of law, the top government spokesperson said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
